selections.name: Call Me Zeus
selections.reason: Two solid trials leading into debut. Top jockey and stable combination.

selections.name: Silverwater Kid
selections.reason: Improved second-up performance to grab second. Fitter and ready to strike.

selections.name: G'day Ausbred
selections.reason: Resuming as a gelding with a solid trial. Can run a bold race fresh.

selections.name: Our Lady Peace
selections.reason: Showed promise last start and gets her chance third-up on the home track.

danger_horse.name: Don't What Me
danger_horse.reason: Minor place contender who can improve third-up.

selections.name: Bello Cavallo
selections.reason: Strong first-up record and trialled well. Looks set for a bright return.

selections.name: Cool Rupert
selections.reason: Resuming after a break with two trials under the belt. Leading player.

selections.name: Yeszem
selections.reason: Excellent return when third last start. Gets a much better setup here.

selections.name: Setta Icon
selections.reason: Hard fit and returned to form last start. Worth including.

danger_horse.name: Winters Kiss
danger_horse.reason: Had excuses first-up and can improve sharply.

selections.name: Katoto
selections.reason: Well backed on debut and ran a strong second. Well bred filly who can win this.

selections.name: Rolling Home
selections.reason: Impressed in two career starts and can overcome the sticky gate.

selections.name: Mortgage
selections.reason: First starter from a leading yard. Runner-up in a recent trial.

selections.name: Lafite
selections.reason: Open to improvement after debut run. Can progress further.

danger_horse.name: Andelise
danger_horse.reason: Capable of a bold debut performance off two trials.

selections.name: Le Smoke (NZ)
selections.reason: Promising debut in NZ and expected to improve sharply for new yard.

selections.name: Artfull
selections.reason: Well-supported on debut and ran a solid fourth. Can feature with natural improvement.

selections.name: Farsain
selections.reason: Made ground from midfield last start. One for the exotics from a handy gate.

selections.name: Broadway Street
selections.reason: Resuming after a break. Back for his second prep and expected to go well.

danger_horse.name: Codename
danger_horse.reason: Solid return expected with two handy trials leading in.

selections.name: Dolce Dior
selections.reason: Narrowly beaten last time out. Top stable and looks ready to win.

selections.name: Inspired Legend
selections.reason: Won well last start and expected to perform strongly again.

selections.name: Luna Bay (NZ)
selections.reason: Boxed on steadily last start. Drops in class and worth including.

selections.name: Beauty Swift
selections.reason: Well placed and sure to prove tough to beat off a solid second.

danger_horse.name: Lots To Love (IRE)
danger_horse.reason: Expecting improvement second-up. Among the better chances.

selections.name: Bang On Time (NZ)
selections.reason: Won by a nose last start. Fitter and should be right in the finish.

selections.name: Mrs Maree
selections.reason: Broke through last time and is worth thought again.

selections.name: My Proclama (NZ)
selections.reason: Raced on the speed and boxed on steadily for second last start. Well placed.

selections.name: Mamma Mia
selections.reason: Won nicely second-up. Facing a tougher challenge but has upside.

danger_horse.name: Take Flight
danger_horse.reason: Tracked the speed and won well two back. Definite top-three prospect.

selections.name: Magical Moments
selections.reason: Strong effort last time when second. Looks a leading hope.

selections.name: Glastonbury Girl
selections.reason: Made ground from the turn last start. Among the leading chances.

selections.name: Empress Of Japan (NZ)
selections.reason: Made ground from midfield last start. Can feature with the right run.

selections.name: Azure Angel
selections.reason: Racing well and looks a top prospect in this field.

danger_horse.name: Rosa Incanta (NZ)
danger_horse.reason: Resuming. Has ability and can run a race fresh.
